See the * [FAQ in the README](README.md#problems-with-invalid-numbers] on how to make * metadata changes. * * Do not modify this file directly! */ return [ 3212 => 'Tongres', 3215 => 'Malines', 3216 => 'Louvain', 322 => 'Bruxelles', 323 => 'Anvers', 3251 => 'Roulers', 3252 => 'Termonde', 3253 => 'Alost', 3255 => 'Renaix', 3256 => 'Courtrai', 3258 => 'Furnes', 3259 => 'Ostende', 329 => 'Gand', ];
